name: tidy-simplify
default_program:
[stages: preflight>detect>analyze>implement>verify>review>audit |
 scope: diff|paths(glob,...) |
 policy: evidence,correctness-first,quality-gates{tests,compat,style},deterministic-output |
 lens: hickey-carmack |
 output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: TARGET_SCOPE
required_inputs.description: Bounded scope to simplify. Must be small enough to verify equivalence with focused checks.

required_inputs.name: FUNCTIONAL_EQUIVALENCE
required_inputs.description: Behavior-preservation contract for the simplification pass. Mandatory because this is a reduction pass, not feature work.

required_inputs.name: SIMPLIFY_GOAL
required_inputs.description: Primary simplification dimension matching the four-step algorithm. Identify the dominant cognitive load source.

required_inputs.name: KNOWN_PAIN
required_inputs.description: Known complexity hotspots to prioritize in the simplification pass.

starter_inputs.label: 어떤 복잡도를 줄일지 (control-flow / data-flow / indirection / immutability / mixed)
